title: Dua Noor to be recited at the time of ending the fast in the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Dua Noor - Iftaar
duas.description:
The Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) recommended this dua to Imam Ali (peace be upon him) and said that Jibreel (as) came to me and said, "Whoever in the holy month of Ramadhan before iftaar recites this dua, Allah answers his prayer, accepts his prayer and fasting, grants his ten requirements, forgives his sins, removes his grief's, makes his heart at ease, grants his wishes, makes his deeds to ascend upward with the deeds of prophets and righteous saints and on the Day of Judgment brings him to His presence with his face illuminated like a bright moon."
Sayyid ibn Tawus and al-Kaf`ami have narrated the following supplication:

segments.arabic: اللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ النُّوْرِ الْعَظِيْمِ وَ رَبَّ الْكُرْسِيِّ الرَّفِيْعِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabban nooril ‘azeem wa rabbal kursiyil rafee’
segments.translation: O Lord of the magnificent light, Lord of the highest heaven,

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ الْبَحْرِ الْمَسْجُوْرِ وَ رَبَّ الشَّفْعِ الْكَبِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa rabbal bahril masjoori wa rabbash shafi’l kabeer
segments.translation: Lord of the flowing seas, Lord of the great intercessor

segments.arabic: وَ النُّوْرِ الْعَزِيْزِ وَ رَبَّ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْإِنْجِيْلِ وَ الزَّبُوْرِ وَالْفُرْقَانِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wan-nooril ‘azeez wa rabbat-tawraati wal injeeli waz-zaboori wal furqaan-il azeem
segments.translation: Lord of the flowing seas, Lord of the great intercessor and brilliant light, Lord ot fhe Tawrat and Injil, and the grand Furqan (criterion).

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ إِلٰهُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ إِلٰهُ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ-
segments.transliteration: anta ilaaju man fis-samavaati wa ilaaju man fil ardhi
segments.translation: You are the only God of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: لا إِلٰهَ فِيْهِمَا غَيْرُكَ وَ أَنْتَ مَلِكُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: la-ilaaha feehima ghayruka wa anta maliku man fis-samavaati
segments.translation: There is no other god save you. You are powerful over everything in the heavens and earth. There is no powerful save You.

segments.arabic: وَ مَلِكُ مَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ لا مَلِكَفِيْهِمَا غَيْرُك
segments.transliteration: wa maliku man fil ardhi la malika feehima ghairuk
segments.translation: You are the owner of the heavens and earth. There is no owner save you.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْكَبِيْرِ وَ نُوْرِ وَجْهِكَ الْمُنِيْرِ وَ بِمُلْكِكَ الْقَدِيم
segments.transliteration: as-asluka bimikal Kabeer wa noori wajhikal muneer wa bi-mulkikal qadeem
segments.translation: I beseech you through your great name, your brilliant superior being, your ever existing kingdom

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu ya qayyum ya hayyu ya qayyum ya hayyu ya qayyum
segments.translation: O Ever living, O Self –Subsisting, O Ever living, O self Subsisting.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ أَشْرَقَ بِه كُلُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ
segments.transliteration: as-asluka bismikal-ladhee ashraqa bihi kullu shay-in
segments.translation: I beseech you in thy name that illuminates everything

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ أَشْرَقَتْ بِهِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَ الْأَرْضُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismikal-ladhee ashraqat bihis-samavaatu wal ardh
segments.translation: and by thy name that radiates in the heavens and earth,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِيْ صَلَحَ بِهِ الْأَوَّلُوْنَ وَ بِهٖ يَصْلُحُ الْآخِرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismikal-ladhee salaha bihil awaaloona wa bihi yaslahul aakhiroon
segments.translation: thy name which sets the people of all times on the right path from the foremost to the last.

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ قَبْلَ كُلِّ حَيٍّ وَ يَا حَيُّ بَعْدَ كُلِّ حَيٍّ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu qabla kulli hayyi wa hayyu ba’da kulli hayyi
segments.translation: O Ever Living who was there before anything else. O Ever Living who is ever existing when no life shall exist.

segments.arabic: وَ يَا حَيُّ لا إِلٰهَ إِلا أَنْتَ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ya hayyu la ilaaha illa anta, salli ‘alaa muhammadin wa aali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Ever Living there is no god save You. Peace be upon Mohammed and his progeny.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَ اجْعَلْ لِيْ مِنْ أَمْرِي يُسْرًا وَ فَرَجًا قَرِيْبًا
segments.transliteration: waghfir li dhunoobi waj’al li min amri yusran wa farajan qareeban
segments.translation: Forgive me my sins, make my affairs easy, and the reappearance near

segments.arabic: وَ ثَبِّتْنِيْ عَلٰى دِيْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰى سُنَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلامُ
segments.transliteration: wa thabbitnee ‘alaa deeni muhammadin wa aali muhammadin wa ‘alaa sunnati muhammadin wa aali muhammadin ‘alayhi wa ‘alayhimus-salam
segments.translation: and keep us firm in the religion of Mohammed and family of Mohammed, on the guidance of Mohammed and family of Mohammed, on the sunnah of Mohammed and his family, peace be upon him and his family.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ عَمَلِيْ فِي الْمَرْفُوْعِ الْمُتَقَبَّلِ
segments.transliteration: waj’al ‘amali fil marfo’il mutaqabbal
segments.translation: Make my deeds lofty and accepted.

segments.arabic: وَ هَبْ لِي كَمَا وَهَبْتَ لِأَوْلِيَائِكَ وَ أَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hab li kama wahabta li awliyaika wa ahli ta-a’tik
segments.translation: Bestow upon me like you have granted your pious and obedient servants.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّيْ مُؤْمِنٌ بِكَ وَ مُتَوَكِّلٌ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inni mominun bika wa mutawakkilun ‘alayk
segments.translation: For surely I am a believer in you, trusting in you,

segments.arabic: مُنِيْبٌ إِلَيْكَ مَعَ مَصِيْرِيْ إِلَيْكَ وَ تَجْمَعُ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: muneebun ilayka ma’a maseeri ilayka wa tajma’u li
segments.translation: turning repentantly to you, to you is my journeys end.

segments.arabic: وَ تَجْمَعَ لئِ وَ لِأَهْلِيْ وَ وُلْدِيَ الْخَيْرَ كُلَّه
segments.transliteration: tajma-‘a li wa li ahli wa wuldi-yal khaira kulluh
segments.translation: Gather for me and for my family and my parents all good

segments.arabic: وَ تَصْرِفُ عَنِّيْ وَ عَنْ وُلْدِيْ وَ أَهْلِيَ الشَّرَّ كُلَّه
segments.transliteration: wa tasrif ‘anni wa ‘an wuldi wa ahli-yash-sharra kulluh
segments.translation: and remove for me , my family and parents all evil.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ الْحَنَّانُ الْمَنَّانُ بَدِيْعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: anta-al ‘hannaul-mannau badi’ us-samavaati wal ardh
segments.translation: You are the compassionate, the supporter and the originator of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: تُعْطِي الْخَيْرَ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَ تَصْرِفُه عَمَّنْ تَشَاءُ فَامْنُنْ عَلَيَّ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: Tuʿṭī al-khayra man tashāʾu wa taṣrifuhu ʿan man tashāʾu fa'mnun ʿalayya bi-raḥmatik
segments.translation: You give good to whom You will and withhold it from whom You will, so bestow upon me Your mercy.

segments.arabic: يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: ya arhamar-rahimeen
segments.translation: O Kind and compassionate.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِ
segments.transliteration: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
segments.translation: يَا وَاسعَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ اِغْفِرْ لِي

_index_meta.title: Dua Noor to be recited at the time of ending the fast in the month of Ramadan
